statement: In every magma, Equation 1782 (`x = (y * z) * ((y * z) * z)`) implies Equation 2350 (`x = (y * (y * (z * x))) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0281
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op y z) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op y (op z x))) w)
